title: Preparing The Dataset
excerpt: We created an opt-out portal and are now waiting before cleaning the dataset and starting training.
content:
On day two, we worked on making the process more transparent for everyone in the server. We built a dedicated opt-out portal so members can choose not to have their messages included in the training data.

We will make an announcement and leave it open for the next 3–4 days, after which we will close it and move on to the next step.

Once the opt-out window ends, we will clean the scraped data, remove the messages of anyone who chose not to participate, and begin preparing the dataset for training.

If everything goes as planned, training will start right after that.
